title: Recover your reference number
intro: Enter the email or phone number you used when submitting your complaint. We will send a verification code if we find matching records.
emailHint: Must match the email you provided at submission.
phoneSmsHint: SMS recovery is not available yet. Use email if you provided one at submission.
requestNote: If we have complaints for this contact, you will receive a code shortly. The same message is shown whether or not a match exists.
otpIntro: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your contact method.
noReferences: No complaints were found for this contact after verification.
manualFallback: Did not use email or phone when you submitted?

errors.requestFailed: Could not send verification code. Try again later.
errors.verifyFailed: Invalid or expired code. Try again.
